question:
Each dumpus is bright. Each dumpus is a rompus. Every rompus is aggressive. Every rompus is a yumpus. Yumpuses are brown. Yumpuses are vumpuses. Every impus is fruity. Every vumpus is sour. Every vumpus is a numpus. Every numpus is not temperate. Every numpus is a zumpus. Zumpuses are metallic. Zumpuses are jompuses. Each jompus is not fruity. Jompuses are tumpuses. Tumpuses are opaque. Every tumpus is a wumpus. Sam is a yumpus.

Is the following statement true or false? Sam is fruity.
